hero.title: Senior Software Engineer
hero.description: 15+ years of experience modernizing legacy systems and building scalable fullstack solutions. Expert in .NET, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Angular, Node.js, AWS, and Azure.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.bio: Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience modernizing legacy systems and building scalable fullstack solutions in multinational settings. Proven leader delivering high-availability (>99.9%) and performance gains (+35%) in critical projects. Skilled in agile, CI/CD, and team leadership.

expertise.frontend: Modern web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Angular. Expertise in building responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces.
expertise.backend: Scalable server-side solutions with .NET, Node.js, and SQL databases. Experience with RESTful APIs, microservices, and data processing.
expertise.cloud: Cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure. Proficient in Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices for high-availability systems.
